name: Ham and Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups dried beans (any type you like)
2 teaspoons Italian seasoning (or your favorite spices)
1 medium onion (instead of dry onion pack), diced
recipeInstructions:
1. If using dried beans that haven't been soaked overnight or rinsed well, cook them on high heat for 2 hours, then lower to low heat and simmer until the beans are tender.
2. Add the cooked beans, diced ham, onion soup mix, and seasoning to a large pot.
3. Add the chopped vegetables (carrot, onion, celery, green pepper) and enough water to cover all ingredients by about an inch.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 7-8 hours, stirring occasionally.
